pcos.name: PCOS (Polycystic Ovary Syndrome)
pcos.explanation: PCOS ek hormonal imbalance hai jisme ovaries mein chhote cysts ban jaate hain. Yeh periods irregular kar deta hai aur male hormones (androgens) zyada ho jaate hain — isi wajah se hair growth, acne, aur weight gain hoti hai.
pcos.urgency_desc: Especially if trying to conceive or periods missing 3+ months

menstrual_irregularities.name: Menstrual Irregularities
menstrual_irregularities.explanation: Irregular periods kayi wajuhaat se ho sakte hain — hormonal imbalance, stress, thyroid issues, PCOS, ya weight changes. Ek cycle ka pattern track karna important hai diagnosis ke liye.
menstrual_irregularities.urgency_desc: Monitor at home if occasional, See a doctor soon if persistent (3+ cycles). Seek urgent care if soaking through pad/tampon every hour for 2+ hours.

anemia.name: Anemia (Iron Deficiency)
anemia.explanation: Anemia us waqt hota hai jab khoon mein red blood cells ya hemoglobin kam ho jaate hain, jiski wajah se body tak oxygen theek se nahi pohanchta. Women mein yeh heavy periods ya iron-poor diet ki wajah se common hai.
anemia.urgency_desc: Monitor at home for mild fatigue, See a doctor soon for persistent symptoms, Seek urgent care for severe dizziness, fainting, or chest pain.
lifestyle_tips: Vitamin C with iron for better absorption

thyroid.name: Thyroid Disorders (Hypo/Hyperthyroidism)
thyroid.explanation: Thyroid gland body ka metabolism control karti hai. Hypothyroidism mein yeh kam active hoti hai (sab kuch slow ho jaata hai), aur hyperthyroidism mein zyada active (sab kuch fast ho jaata hai). Dono symptoms se identify hote hain aur blood test se confirm hote hain.
thyroid.urgency_desc: See a doctor soon for most cases. Seek urgent care for rapid heartbeat with chest pain, or severe weakness.

endometriosis.name: Endometriosis
endometriosis.explanation: Endometriosis mein uterus ki lining jaisa tissue uterus ke bahar (ovaries, fallopian tubes) grow karta hai. Yeh severe pain ka cause banta hai, especially periods ke doran, aur agar treat na kiya jaaye toh fertility ko affect kar sakta hai.
endometriosis.urgency_desc: See a doctor soon for consistent pain pattern. Seek urgent care for sudden severe abdominal pain or fainting.

menopause.name: Menopause / Perimenopause
menopause.explanation: Menopause ek natural phase hai jab ovaries periods produce karna band kar dete hain, usually age 45-55 ke darmiyan. Perimenopause uske pehle ki transition phase hai.
menopause.urgency_desc: Generally natural, but talk to a doctor if symptoms severely impact daily life.
lifestyle_tips: Calcium and Vitamin D rich diet

uti.name: UTI / Vaginal Infections
uti.explanation: Yeh infections common hain aur usually treatable hain antibiotics ya antifungals se — early treatment complications avoid karta hai.
uti.urgency_desc: See a doctor soon (within 1-2 days, especially if fever is present).
